name: Quinoa Pilaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse quinoa in a strainer and remove any debris.
2. Place the quinoa in a large non-stick saucepan and toast until it darkens slightly.
3. Add chicken broth. Bring to a boil, cover, reduce heat, and simmer about 20 minutes until tender.
4. In another skillet, heat butter; add onion and garlic and cook until tender, about 3 minutes.
5. Stir in quinoa, lemon zest, thyme leaves, parsley, salt, and pepper to taste.
(Note: This recipe remains accurate to the original while ensuring clarity and consistency.)
